prompt: A kawaii scrapbook-style photo poster. The person from the attached photo is posing on green grass, wearing a bunny hairpin and sporty grey and white clothes. Featuring a pastel yellow and pink theme, with playful large bubble typography showing the name 'Yu Ka'. Around the composition, three cut-out Polaroid photos are layered in playful and cute poses, accompanied by plush bunny dolls, macarons, ribbons, flowers, doodle graphics, hand-drawn hearts, stars, swirl patterns, and a camera. Features a cheerful Korean aesthetic, soft natural light, a whimsical collage layout, vibrant yet soft pastel tones, a magazine-style portrait pictorial, highly intricate details, a lovely and playful atmosphere, and a trendy social media scrapbook design. Sharp focus. 4k high quality.
